changes: PRE-RELEASE: Introduced a unified premium motion system for screen transitions, tap feedback, FABs, and key interactive surfaces ahead of v1.0.
FIXED: Back button and back gesture now follow the real in-app screen history one step at a time instead of collapsing nested settings flows back to Dashboard.
IMPROVED: Root tab switching now preserves expected navigation state while still allowing intentional flow resets where designed.
POLISH: Refined press feedback across cards, action buttons, and primary controls for a smoother, more consistent premium feel.
ADDED: Setup now blocks save only when Business Name, Address, or PIN Code is empty, with red field errors and automatic focus on the first missing field.
CONFIRMED: Phone Number, Email Address, GSTIN, PAN, and all bank details remain optional in both Setup and Settings.
ADDED: GST state code can now be auto-detected from device location during Setup, with manual detection available from Settings.
ADDED: A live English pending-fields summary now appears at the bottom of Setup and Business Profile editing whenever required fields are incomplete.
IMPROVED: Back gesture shows screen preview.
IMPROVED: Voucher type list preserved on back.
IMPROVED: Smooth slide animations on navigation.
FIXED: Build warnings removed for clean build.
FIXED: Deprecated APIs replaced with stable ones.
FIXED: Unused imports and variables cleaned up.
FIXED: Predictive back gesture support added.
FIXED: Navigation back stack behaves correctly.
PERFORMANCE: Cleaner build output, zero warnings.
